basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Study Coordinator. Candidates with PhD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 24-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Rajkot official website.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University and One year experience in the relevant field

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
